description_long: This is a modern, stylized assault rifle with a distinctive black and orange color scheme, featuring angular patterns and accents along the stock, receiver, and magazine. The rifle has a fixed stock with geometric detailing, a prominent pistol grip, and a detachable curved magazine. The barrel is standard length with a front sight post and a simple muzzle device, likely a flash hider. The receiver is adorned with bold, contrasting graphics, and the handguard is ribbed for grip. Iron sights are present, and the overall design suggests a blend of functionality and visual flair, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A black and orange modern assault rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and iron sights, featuring bold geometric patterns and a standard barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, the fixed stock, curved magazine, and detailed orange and black graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, rear sight, and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the magazine release, trigger, and the continuation of the geometric design on the stock and receiver.
